tools.name: compute_consumption_differences
tools.description: Pairwise differences between three segment averages.
tools.return_description: {"diff_sme_lam": number, "diff_lam_kam": number, "diff_kam_sme": number}.

tools.name: count_customers_by_segment_and_currency
tools.description: Count of customers belonging to a specific segment and using a specific currency.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column.

currency.description: Currency code stored in the `Currency` column.

tools.return_description: {"count": integer|null} — number of matching customers, or null if none.

tools.name: count_gas_stations_by_country_and_segment
tools.description: Count of gas stations for a specified country and segment.

country.description: ISO country code stored in the `Country` column of `gasstations`.

segment.description: Gas station segment (e.g., 'Premium', 'Discount') from the `Segment` column.

tools.return_description: {count: integer|null} — number of matching gas stations.

tools.name: count_transactions_by_country_date_time_range
tools.description: Count transactions for a given country, optionally filtered by exact date, a time window, or a start year.

start_year.description: Four‑digit year; counts transactions on or after this year.

tools.return_description: {count: integer|null} — number of matching transactions.

tools.name: count_transactions_by_date_time_currency
tools.description: Count transactions on a given date before a specific time and paid in a given currency.

before_time.description: Upper exclusive bound for transaction time (HH:MM:SS).

currency.description: Value of the `Currency` column in the `customers` table.

tools.return_description: {"count": integer} – number of matching transactions.

tools.name: get_average_min_consumption_by_segment
tools.description: Average consumption for the globally‑minimum‑consumption record of a given segment, currency and year.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column of `customers`.

currency.description: Currency code stored in the `Currency` column of `customers`.

tools.return_description: {"average": number|null} — the computed average, or null if no matching rows.

tools.name: get_average_monthly_consumption_by_segment_and_year
tools.description: Average monthly consumption (total consumption divided by 12) for customers belonging to a specific segment in a given year.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column of the `customers` table.

tools.return_description: {average_monthly_consumption: number|null} — the computed average monthly consumption, or null if no rows match.

tools.name: get_average_transaction_amount_by_month
tools.description: Average transaction amount for a specified year and month in the transactions_1k table.
tools.return_description: {"rows": [[number|null]]} — list of one row containing the AVG(Amount) (null if no rows).

tools.name: get_average_transaction_price_by_currency
tools.description: Average transaction price (Price column) for all transactions made by customers using a specified currency.

currency.description: Currency code stored in the `Currency` column of the `customers` table.

tools.return_description: {"average_price": number|null} — the average `Price` of matching transactions, or null if none.

tools.name: get_consumption_by_date_price_and_month
tools.description: For customers who paid a specific price on a given transaction date, return their consumption in a specified year‑month.

price.description: Exact transaction price to match (`Price` column).

target_month.description: Year‑month in YYYYMM format for the consumption record (`yearmonth`.`Date`).

tools.return_description: {records: [{customer_id: integer, date: string, consumption: number}, ...]} – list of matching rows; empty list if none.

tools.name: get_consumption_difference_between_customers
tools.description: Compute the numeric difference in total gas consumption between two customers for a specific year‑month (YYYYMM).

customer_a.description: CustomerID of the first customer (the minuend).

customer_b.description: CustomerID of the second customer (the subtrahend).

tools.return_description: {"difference": number|null} — consumption of customer_a minus consumption of customer_b for the given month.

tools.name: get_countries_of_gas_stations_by_transaction_date
tools.description: Return distinct country codes of gas stations that have at least one transaction in the specified year‑month (YYYYMM).
tools.return_description: {"countries": ["CZE", "SVK", ...]} – list of distinct country codes; empty list if none.

tools.name: get_country_by_transaction
tools.description: Return the ISO country code of the gas station for a transaction identified by CardID or by exact transaction Date.

card_id.description: Value of the `CardID` column in the `transactions_1k` table.

date.description: Exact transaction date (YYYY‑MM‑DD) matching the `Date` column.

tools.return_description: {"country": string|null} — the country code, or null if no matching transaction.

tools.name: get_country_of_gas_station
tools.description: Return the ISO country code of the gas station that sold the most expensive unit matching the supplied criteria (either a specific product_id, or a specific date and price).

date.description: Transaction date (YYYY‑MM‑DD) when filtering by date+price.

price.description: Exact transaction price to match when filtering by date+price.

tools.return_description: {country: string|null} — the country code of the matching gas station, or null if none.

tools.name: get_country_with_most_gas_stations_by_segment
tools.description: Return the country that has the most gas stations for a specified segment, and the total number of stations of that segment across all countries.

segment.description: Value of the `Segment` column in the `gasstations` table.

tools.return_description: {country: string, count: integer} — the country code with the most stations and the overall count of stations for the segment.

tools.name: get_currency_by_date_and_consumption
tools.description: Currency used by the customer who spent a specific amount in a given year‑month.

consumption.description: Exact consumption amount to match in the `Consumption` column.

tools.return_description: {"currency": string|null} — the currency code, or null if no match.

tools.name: get_currency_by_datetime
tools.description: Return distinct currency codes used by customers for transactions on a given date and time.
tools.return_description: List of distinct currency strings (may be empty).

tools.name: get_customer_by_segment_and_month
tools.description: Return the CustomerID for a given month (YYYYMM), optionally limited to a segment, ordered by total consumption.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column of the `customers` table.

order.description: Sorting direction: "asc" for the least consumption, "desc" for the most.

tools.return_description: {"customer_id": integer|null} — the CustomerID selected by the ordering, or null if no matching rows.

tools.name: get_distinct_transaction_times_by_chain
tools.description: Return all distinct transaction times (HH:MM:SS) for transactions that occurred at gas stations belonging to a specified chain.

chain_id.description: Identifier of the gas‑station chain (matches `ChainID` in the `gasstations` table).

tools.return_description: {"times": [string, ...]} – list of distinct `Time` values sorted alphabetically; empty list if no matches.

tools.name: get_earliest_customer_segment
tools.description: Return the Segment of the customer associated with the earliest transaction.
tools.return_description: {segment: string|null} — the segment of the earliest customer.

tools.name: get_gas_station_with_highest_revenue
tools.description: Return the GasStationID of the gas station that generated the highest total revenue (sum of `Price`) in the `transactions_1k` table.
tools.return_description: {gas_station_id: integer|null} — the ID of the top‑revenue gas station.

tools.name: get_highest_monthly_consumption_by_year
tools.description: Maximum total gas consumption for any month within a specified year.
tools.return_description: {"max_monthly_consumption": number|null} — the highest summed Consumption for a month in the given year.

tools.name: get_peak_consumption_month_by_segment_and_year
tools.description: Return the two‑digit month (MM) with the highest total gas consumption for customers of a specific segment in a given year.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column of the `customers` table.

tools.return_description: {"peak_month": string|null} — month (MM) with highest summed consumption, or null if no rows match.

tools.name: get_percentage_increases_by_segment_between_years
tools.description: Compute the percentage increase in total consumption between start_year and end_year for each segment (SME, LAM, KAM). Percentage = (consumption_end - consumption_start) * 100 / consumption_start.
tools.return_description: {percent_sme: number|null, percent_lam: number|null, percent_kam: number|null} — percentage increase for each segment in the order SME, LAM, KAM.

tools.name: get_product_descriptions_by_country
tools.description: List distinct product descriptions for transactions that occurred at gas stations in the specified country.

country.description: ISO country code stored in the `Country` column of the `gasstations` table.

tools.return_description: {"descriptions": [string, ...]} – list of distinct product description strings; empty list if no matches.

tools.name: get_product_id_by_datetime
tools.description: Retrieve the ProductID of the transaction that occurred on a specific date and time.
tools.return_description: {"product_id": integer|null} — the ProductID of the matching transaction, or null if none.

tools.name: get_segment_percentage_by_country
tools.description: Percentage of gas stations belonging to a specified segment within a given country. Calculated as (count of rows where Country and Segment match) * 100 / total rows for the country.

country.description: ISO country code stored in the `Country` column of `gasstations`.

segment.description: Segment value from the `Segment` column of `gasstations`.

tools.return_description: {percentage: number|null} — the computed percentage (0‑100) or null if the country has no rows.

tools.name: get_segment_with_min_consumption
tools.description: Return the Segment of the customer with the smallest total gas consumption. If `year_month` is provided, the calculation is limited to that month; otherwise it uses all months.

year_month.description: Year‑month in YYYYMM format (e.g., 201309). If omitted, the whole dataset is considered.

tools.return_description: {"segment": string|null} — the segment of the lowest‑consuming customer, or null if no data.

tools.name: get_top_customer_by_currency_and_year
tools.description: Return the CustomerID of the customer who consumed the most gas in a specified year while paying with a given currency.

currency.description: Currency code stored in the `Currency` column of the `customers` table.

tools.return_description: {customer_id: integer|null} — the CustomerID with the highest total consumption, or null if no matching rows.

tools.name: get_top_customer_by_date
tools.description: Return the CustomerID of the customer who paid the highest total Price on a specific transaction date.

date.description: Transaction date in ISO format YYYY-MM-DD (e.g., 2012-08-25).

tools.return_description: {"customer_id": integer|null} — the CustomerID with the highest summed Price on the given date, or null if no rows match.

tools.name: get_top_customer_by_segment_currency_and_month
tools.description: Return the CustomerID of the customer in a specified segment who used a given currency and had the highest total consumption in a specific year‑month.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column of the `customers` table.

currency.description: Currency code stored in the `Currency` column of the `customers` table.

tools.return_description: {"customer_id": integer|null} — the CustomerID with the highest summed consumption for the given filters, or null if none.

tools.name: get_top_product_descriptions
tools.description: Return the full product descriptions of the top‑selling products, ordered by transaction amount descending.

limit.description: Number of top products to return (e.g., 5).

tools.return_description: {descriptions: [string, ...]} – list of product descriptions in rank order.

tools.name: get_total_consumption_by_customer_and_date_range
tools.description: Total gas consumption for a specific customer between a start and end year‑month (inclusive).

customer_id.description: Value of the `CustomerID` column in the `yearmonth` table.

start_date.description: Start of the period, formatted as YYYYMM (e.g., 201308).

end_date.description: End of the period, formatted as YYYYMM (e.g., 201311).

tools.return_description: {"total_consumption": number|null} — summed `Consumption` for the matching rows, or null if none.

tools.name: get_total_consumption_by_segment_and_month
tools.description: Total gas consumption for all customers of a given segment in a specific year‑month.

segment.description: Customer segment as stored in the `Segment` column of `customers`.

tools.return_description: {"total_consumption": number|null} — summed `Consumption` for matching rows, or null if none.

tools.name: get_year_with_max_gas_consumption_by_currency
tools.description: Return the four‑digit year (YYYY) that recorded the highest total gas consumption for a specified currency.

currency.description: Currency code from the `Currency` column in the `customers` table (e.g., 'EUR', 'USD').

tools.return_description: {year: string|null} – the year with the maximum summed `Consumption`, or null if no rows match.

tools.name: subtract_counts
tools.description: Subtract count_b from count_a and return the numeric difference.
tools.return_description: {"difference": integer} — the result of count_a - count_b.
